name: Slow Porridge
recipeInstructions:
Place water, cereal, and dried fruit in slow cooker.
Stir. Cook on low for 8 - 10 hours. The mixture should be like a thick soup, so do not add milk at the table.
Adjust the amount of water needed if necessary based on your slow cooker model.
For added flavor, sprinkle a bit of nutmeg, mace, or cinnamon in any combination. You may also try brown rice, barley, rye berries, whole oats, or wheat berries. Note that cracked grains like oatmeal or cracked wheat may become too mushy for some tastes.
